title: Green Elytra!
description: This is a vanilla resource pack to change your elytra green!
body: This is another vanilla elytra resource pack to turn it into green this time! I really appreciate the support I have gotten so far on my first two packs. Just like my other, it is best to use this without a cape due to Minecraft making your cape the same texture as your elytra.  I will continue to upload more in the future of more colors! Thank you again!!
